features.name: Demo Biologics Database Setup
features.description: Initializes and populates the demo Biologics (ADC) database on package start, providing sample data for exploration and demonstration.
features.evidence_summary: createDemoBiologicsData and autostartbiologics share the same initialization theme; the autostart role ensures demo data is ready when the package loads.

features.name: ADC Glyph Rendering
features.description: Generates and populates visual glyph icons (PNG/base64) for ADC molecules, enabling rich visual representation of ADC compounds in grid and info-pane views.
features.evidence_summary: populateAdcGlyphs is the sole function for ADC visual icon generation; info-pane docs are linked because ADC glyphs surface inside Datagrok info panes.

features.name: Antibody Profile & Assay Query
features.description: Queries the biologics database for comprehensive antibody profiles and assay results filtered by organism and target, including HC/LC chain data.
features.evidence_summary: Both queries retrieve organism/target-scoped antibody and assay data from the same biologics connection; the changelog records a direct update to assaysByOrganism.

features.name: ADC Activity & IC50 Filtering
features.description: Finds ADCs that meet specified caspase-activity or IC50 thresholds, supporting compound triage by potency.
features.evidence_summary: Both queries share the pattern of filtering ADCs by a numeric activity threshold (caspase activity and IC50), forming a cohesive compound-triage feature.

features.name: ADC-Drug Linkage Query
features.description: Retrieves ADCs linked to a specified drug identifier, enabling drug-centric ADC exploration across the biologics database.
features.evidence_summary: adcsLinkedToDrug has a distinct drug-linkage lookup pattern that does not fit the activity-threshold or antibody-profile features.

features.name: Dose-Response Curve Retrieval
features.description: Retrieves the dose-response curve JSON for a biologics assay result by its GROKCRV-###### identifier, enabling programmatic access to curve-fitting data.
features.evidence_summary: getBiologicsCurveByAssayResultIdentifier provides structured-ID point-lookup of dose-response curve JSON, distinct from the organism/target-scoped assay queries.

features.name: Peptide HELM Sequence Retrieval
features.description: Retrieves the HELM sequence notation for a biologics peptide by its GROKPEP-###### identifier, supporting sequence-level inspection of peptide therapeutics.
features.evidence_summary: getBiologicsPeptideHelmByIdentifier is the sole query for peptide HELM notation lookup, a distinct sequence-retrieval concern separate from assay or ADC queries.
